. When Jupiter transits
Virgo and Libra, he will be reinstated
and rise high. This will be at about 54. Moon
Times will be good upto 61-64. Again
at 62-63 the times will be unfavourable Sat. Ven.
Sun
and after 65 upto 75 the' period will be Dt. Mer.
good. He will have 4 or 5 children.
Two of them (girls) will be very fortunate. They will hold high
posts in medical line. The conjunctions of Mercury and Venus; of Saturn
and Ketu indicate knowledge of law. The disciple wanted to know
the result of Rami's placement next to Jupiter. The Master said that the
parent (father) of the native (Sun) is in Virgo, a friendly sign and Mercury
conjunct Venus indicates the father having relations with a Sudra woman
besides his own wife.
CHART 53
Here, the Sun is placed in Virgo;
and Venus and Mercury in the next
Jupt. Dh. Mars
house. The father of the native was a
dealer in costly dresses etc The con
junction of Venus and Mercury en
